description_long: This is a modern, rectangular cabinet with a flat wooden top and sides featuring a natural wood grain pattern. The front face is visually divided into sections, with a large black panel and a smaller white geometric section, suggesting the presence of drawers or doors. The lower front area displays a mix of white and brown panels with angular, abstract designs, adding a contemporary aesthetic. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from wood, with possible laminate or painted surfaces for the colored sections. There are no visible handles, but the design implies push-to-open mechanisms or concealed grips. The overall build is solid and boxy, suitable for use in urban interiors such as offices, lobbies, or modern homes.
description: A modern, boxy wooden cabinet with a flat top, wood grain sides, and abstract black and white front panels. The design is sleek and contemporary, with no visible handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main black panel, white geometric section, and a mix of wood and white surfaces.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the continuous wood grain pattern and the cabinet's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain, uninterrupted wood grain surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with wood grain and a glimpse of the white geometric front edge.
